prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
```pddl
(initialize_itinerary_slot day1_morning_segment)
(bind_transport_to_slot day1_morning_segment transport_option_train)
(attach_forecast_to_slot day1_morning_segment weather_forecast_day1)
(validate_slot_with_forecast day1_morning_segment weather_forecast_day1)
(reserve_venue_for_slot day1_morning_segment venue_art_museum)
(select_weather_window_a_for_segment day1_morning_segment weather_window_precipitation_ok weather_forecast_day1)
(allocate_venue_to_daysegment_a_under_window day1_morning_segment weather_window_precipitation_ok venue_art_museum)
(release_venue_from_slot day1_morning_segment venue_art_museum)
(release_forecast_from_slot day1_morning_segment weather_forecast_day1)
(initialize_itinerary_slot day1_afternoon_segment)
(bind_transport_to_slot day1_afternoon_segment transport_option_bus)
(attach_forecast_to_slot day1_afternoon_segment weather_forecast_day1)
(validate_slot_with_forecast day1_afternoon_segment weather_forecast_day1)
(reserve_venue_for_slot day1_afternoon_segment venue_art_museum)
(select_weather_window_b_for_segment day1_afternoon_segment weather_window_temperature_ok weather_forecast_day1)
(allocate_venue_to_daysegment_b_under_window day1_afternoon_segment weather_window_temperature_ok venue_art_museum)
(release_venue_from_slot day1_afternoon_segment venue_art_museum)
(release_forecast_from_slot day1_afternoon_segment weather_forecast_day1)
(create_reservation_from_segments_and_windows day1_morning_segment day1_afternoon_segment weather_window_precipitation_ok weather_window_temperature_ok reservation_slot_1)
(attach_forecast_to_slot day1_morning_segment weather_forecast_day1)
(mark_reservation_time_window_ready reservation_slot_1 day1_morning_segment weather_forecast_day1)
(release_forecast_from_slot day1_morning_segment weather_forecast_day1)
(finalize_day_segment_a_allocation day1_morning_segment reservation_slot_1)
(finalize_day_segment_b_allocation day1_afternoon_segment reservation_slot_1)
(initialize_itinerary_slot primary_itinerary_plan)
(bind_transport_to_slot primary_itinerary_plan transport_option_taxi)
(attach_forecast_to_slot primary_itinerary_plan weather_forecast_day1)
(validate_slot_with_forecast primary_itinerary_plan weather_forecast_day1)
(claim_time_window_for_reservation primary_itinerary_plan time_window_morning reservation_slot_1)
(mark_plan_ready_for_enrichment primary_itinerary_plan time_window_morning reservation_slot_1 weather_forecast_day1)
(allocate_equipment_to_plan primary_itinerary_plan equipment_raincoat)
(reserve_venue_for_slot primary_itinerary_plan venue_art_museum)
(attach_equipment_and_venue_to_plan_variant_primary primary_itinerary_plan equipment_raincoat venue_art_museum time_window_morning reservation_slot_1)
(attach_contingency_to_plan primary_itinerary_plan contingency_indoor_tour)
(apply_contingency_and_mark_plan_resources_allocated primary_itinerary_plan contingency_indoor_tour time_window_morning reservation_slot_1)
(approve_plan_without_preferences primary_itinerary_plan)
(release_equipment_from_plan primary_itinerary_plan equipment_raincoat)
(release_venue_from_slot primary_itinerary_plan venue_art_museum)
(detach_contingency_from_plan primary_itinerary_plan contingency_indoor_tour)
(release_forecast_from_slot primary_itinerary_plan weather_forecast_day1)
(attach_forecast_to_slot day1_morning_segment weather_forecast_day1)
(apply_traveler_preference_and_constraint_to_slot day1_morning_segment weather_constraint_no_heavy_rain weather_forecast_day1)
(integrate_preference_and_constraint_into_daysegment_a day1_morning_segment transport_option_train weather_constraint_no_heavy_rain)
(release_forecast_from_slot day1_morning_segment weather_forecast_day1)
(attach_forecast_to_slot day1_afternoon_segment weather_forecast_day1)
(apply_traveler_preference_and_constraint_to_slot day1_afternoon_segment weather_constraint_no_heavy_rain weather_forecast_day1)
(integrate_preference_and_constraint_into_daysegment_b day1_afternoon_segment transport_option_bus weather_constraint_no_heavy_rain)
(release_forecast_from_slot day1_afternoon_segment weather_forecast_day1)
(attach_forecast_to_slot primary_itinerary_plan weather_forecast_day1)
(apply_traveler_preference_and_constraint_to_slot primary_itinerary_plan weather_constraint_no_heavy_rain weather_forecast_day1)
(integrate_preference_and_constraint_into_itinerary_plan primary_itinerary_plan transport_option_taxi weather_constraint_no_heavy_rain)
(release_forecast_from_slot primary_itinerary_plan weather_forecast_day1)
(initialize_itinerary_slot alternate_itinerary_plan)
(bind_transport_to_slot alternate_itinerary_plan transport_option_train)
(attach_forecast_to_slot alternate_itinerary_plan weather_forecast_day1)
(validate_slot_with_forecast alternate_itinerary_plan weather_forecast_day1)
(claim_time_window_for_reservation alternate_itinerary_plan time_window_afternoon reservation_slot_1)
(mark_plan_ready_for_enrichment alternate_itinerary_plan time_window_afternoon reservation_slot_1 weather_forecast_day1)
(allocate_equipment_to_plan alternate_itinerary_plan equipment_raincoat)
(reserve_venue_for_slot alternate_itinerary_plan venue_art_museum)
(attach_equipment_and_venue_to_plan_variant_primary alternate_itinerary_plan equipment_raincoat venue_art_museum time_window_afternoon reservation_slot_1)
(attach_contingency_to_plan alternate_itinerary_plan contingency_indoor_tour)
(apply_contingency_and_mark_plan_resources_allocated alternate_itinerary_plan contingency_indoor_tour time_window_afternoon reservation_slot_1)
(approve_plan_without_preferences alternate_itinerary_plan)
(apply_traveler_preference_and_constraint_to_slot alternate_itinerary_plan weather_constraint_no_heavy_rain weather_forecast_day1)
(integrate_preference_and_constraint_into_itinerary_plan alternate_itinerary_plan transport_option_train weather_constraint_no_heavy_rain)
```
message.reasoning:
The problem is a planning problem in PDDL for weather-aware itinerary planning. The goal is to have slot_integration_completed for day1_morning_segment, day1_afternoon_segment, primary_itinerary_plan, and alternate_itinerary_plan.


## Defining the Planning Problem  
- The task is a weather-aware itinerary planning problem modeled in PDDL (Planning Domain Definition Language).  
- The objective is to achieve slot_integration_completed for day1_morning_segment, day1_afternoon_segment, primary_itinerary_plan, and alternate_itinerary_plan.

## Examining Initial State  
- The initial state includes objects like day segments (day1_morning_segment, day1_afternoon_segment), itinerary plans (primary and alternate), and various resources like transports (train, bus, taxi) and weather forecasts.  
- No slots are initialized yet, but day segments and plans are categorized as itinerary_slots, with associations like plans linked to the same day segments.  

## Identifying Required Actions  
- To achieve slot_integration_completed, actions like integrate_preference_and_constraint_into_daysegment_a are needed, requiring preference_applied, transport_binding, and weather_constraint_binding.  
- Preference_applied requires allocation_confirmed, which comes from finalize_day_segment_allocation for segments and approve_plan actions for plans, involving steps like reservation creation and weather constraint availability.  

## Analyzing Plan Relationships  
- Both primary and alternate itinerary plans share the same day segments and reservation (reservation_slot_1), potentially complicating integration.  
- This shared structure suggests processing both plans simultaneously to meet slot_integration_completed for all goals.

## Examining Resource Categories  
- The domain includes resource categories like forecast, venue, special_request, traveler_preference, weather_constraint, equipment_provision, and contingency_option.  
- Forecast_supertypes include activity_candidate, time_window, and guideline, while weather_window_supertypes are weather_window_type_a, weather_window_type_b, and reservation.

## Investigating Type Hierarchy  
- Day_segment_root is a subtype of itinerary_slot_root, and location_root is a subtype of itinerary_slot.  
- Itinerary_plan is a subtype of location_root, making it indirectly a subtype of itinerary_slot, while day_segment_a (day1_morning_segment) is under day_segment_root, not itinerary_slot.

## Analyzing Type Mismatches  
- The predicate slot_integration_completed is defined for itinerary_slot, but actions like integrate_preference_and_constraint_into_daysegment_a apply it to day_segment_a, suggesting a type mismatch.  
- Ready_for_processing and other predicates are also defined for itinerary_slot, but used with day_segment_a, indicating potential domain issues in PDDL typing.

## Exploring Domain Assumptions  
- Despite type inconsistencies, the goal requires slot_integration_completed for day segments and plans, implying the planner must assume these objects are treated as itinerary_slots.  
- Actions like select_weather_window_a_for_segment suggest day segments are processed similarly to itinerary_slots, possibly overriding strict type checking.

## Exploring Reservation Creation  
- Creating a standard reservation requires both day segments to be selected and ready for reservation, ensuring no alternatives are used.  
- Enriched reservations, like with window_a_secondary, allow one segment to be alternative and prepared but not ready, while the other is selected and ready.  

## Investigating Plan Enrichment  
- Approving plans without preferences requires plan_resources_allocated, achieved through contingency application and enrichment stages, excluding secondary windows.  
- Plan enrichment involves attaching equipment, venues, and time windows, with variants depending on whether secondary windows are tagged or not.  

## Analyzing Time Window Claims  
- Claiming a time window for reservation needs the plan ready for processing, reservation created, and time window available, marking it as claimed.  
- This process involves bindings for time windows and reservations, ensuring the plan is prepared for further allocation.

## Managing Weather Forecasts  
- Attaching weather forecast for day1 to the afternoon segment makes it ready for further processing.  
- If the forecast is already bound to the morning segment, it needs to be released and rebound to process the afternoon segment.

## Handling Venue Reservations  
- Releasing the venue from the morning segment makes it available for reserving the afternoon segment.  
- After selecting a weather window, the venue can be allocated, preparing and readying the afternoon segment for reservation.

## Creating and Preparing Reservations  
- Creating a reservation binds both morning and afternoon segments to their weather windows, marking the slot as not available.  
- Marking the reservation time window ready requires rebinding the forecast to the morning segment, ensuring proper preparation.

## Finalizing Segment Allocations  
- Finalizing allocation for both morning and afternoon segments confirms their status, requiring them to be prepared, ready, and have a created, prepared reservation.  
- Once segments are confirmed, the process moves to handling the primary itinerary plan.

## Initializing Itinerary Plans  
- Initializing the primary itinerary plan involves binding a transport option, like a taxi, and attaching a weather forecast.  
- Validating the plan with the forecast marks it ready for processing, setting the stage for further actions.

## Extending Plan Readiness  
- Applying preferences consumes constraints, making them unavailable, but doesn't affect forecast bindings, keeping them intact.  
- To process the next slot, the forecast must be released from the previous slot and rebound, ensuring continuity for plan readiness.  

## Managing Transport and Constraints  
- Transport bindings are released after integration, making them available for reuse in alternate plans like the afternoon slot.  
- Constraints are consumed during application and released afterward, allowing reuse for subsequent plans without conflict.  

## Handling Alternate Plan Resources  
- Alternate plans can reuse equipment, contingencies, and venues after releasing them from primary plans, ensuring resource availability.  
- Venue assignment for alternate plans requires reserving the venue slot after releasing it from the primary, maintaining allocation flexibility.  

## Addressing Plan Initialization  
- Primary and alternate plans initially have guideline bindings available, like safety briefings and crowd control, but these weren't used in the process.  
- Itinerary plans are subtypes of itinerary slots, allowing actions like initializing and binding transport, though day segments may not require separate initialization.

## Preparing Segments  
- Reattaching the forecast to the morning segment ensures it’s ready for marking the reservation time window prepared.  
- Creating a reservation combines morning and afternoon segments with suitable weather windows, setting the stage for further processing.

## Finalizing Segment Allocations  
- Finalizing allocations for both morning and afternoon segments confirms their status, with no additional forecast needed for the afternoon.  
- Once segments are confirmed, the process moves to handling the primary itinerary plan, ensuring all prerequisites are met.

## Initializing Itinerary Plans  
- Initializing the primary itinerary plan includes binding a transport option, like a taxi, and attaching a weather forecast.  
- Validating the plan with the forecast marks it ready for processing, preparing for subsequent resource allocations.

## Claiming Resources  
- Claiming a time window for the primary plan binds it to the reservation, ensuring morning slot allocation.  
- Marking the plan ready for enrichment requires the forecast to remain bound, facilitating resource integration.

## Allocating Plan Resources  
- Allocating equipment, like raincoats, and reserving venues, such as the art museum, prepares the primary plan for enrichment.  
- Attaching contingencies, like indoor tours, and approving the plan marks resources as allocated, completing the primary stage.

## Releasing Resources  
- Releasing equipment, venues, and contingencies from the primary plan makes them available for reuse in alternate plans.  
- Detaching the forecast from the primary plan concludes resource management, setting up for alternate plan processing.

## Managing Morning Segment  
- Validating the morning segment with the weather forecast ensures it’s ready for venue reservation.  
- Selecting a weather window for precipitation and allocating the art museum venue prepares for segment processing.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
